name: Chocolate Chip Cookies (Low-fat)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl of an electric mixer, beat together butter, oil, and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add egg, applesauce, and vanilla; beat until blended.
3. Beat in baking powder, soda, and salt, then flour until smooth.
4. Scrape the side of the bowl, then stir in oats and chocolate chips.
5. Drop dough by 2-tablespoon portions onto 2 lightly oiled 12-by-15-inch baking sheets, spacing evenly.
6. Dip fingertips in granulated sugar, then pat cookies into 1/3-inch-thick rounds.
7. Bake the dough right away; if allowed to sit, cookies will be dry. Bake in a 350°F oven until pale golden, about 10 minutes. Switch pan positions after 5 minutes.
8. Lift to racks; eat warm or cool. Makes about 25 cookies.
- Per cookie: 145 calories (29.5% from fat) 2.3g protein 4.6g fat (1.9g saturated) 25g carbohydrates 104mg sodium 11mg cholesterol
